# Content Index Skill

## Auto-Load When

- planning blogs, resource hubs, landing-page clusters, or multi-page editorial systems

## Rules

- every new content asset must have a clear role in the site structure
- prevent cannibalization across similar topics
- connect supporting content to pillar pages
- define conversion intent for each asset

## Checklist

- target query identified
- parent or sibling pages identified
- internal linking targets listed
- CTA intent defined
- duplication risk reviewed

## Best Practices

- cluster around user journeys, not just keywords
- keep templates consistent while preserving unique value per asset
